meta.title: Real-Time Logistics Data Platform | TiDB
meta.description: TiDB powers real-time supply chain visibility by unifying operational and analytical data in a single distributed SQL platform for global logistics operations.

props.headline: Real-Time Logistics Data Platform for Global Supply Chain Visibility
props.subheadline: TiDB powers real-time logistics and supply chain visibility by unifying operational and analytical data in a single, distributed SQL platform. Track orders, inventory, and shipments without ETL delays, sharding complexity, or downtime.

props.title: Why Choose TiDB for Logistics Data

items.title: Real-Time Insight
items.description: Query live operational data and historical events in milliseconds

items.title: Elastic Scale
items.description: Handle unpredictable spikes from orders, tracking, and optimization workloads

items.title: Always-On Availability
items.description: Built-in high availability across regions for 24/7 logistics operations

props.title: Why Legacy Databases Break Real-Time Supply Chain Visibility
props.subtitle:
Logistics platforms generate high-velocity operational data from orders and inventory updates to shipment scans and telematics events
Legacy databases can’t support real-time supply chain workloads at scale, leading teams to stitch together sharded databases and analytics systems that increase latency, complexity, and risk.

items.title: Batch ETL Kills Real Time Visibility
items.description: Batch ETL breaks real-time logistics visibility, leading to stale data and missed SLAs.

items.title: Sharding Fragments Logistics Data
items.description: Manual sharding and separate analytics systems fragment logistics data, eliminating a single source of truth across orders, inventory, and shipments.

items.title: Concurrency Limits Break at Peak
items.description: Legacy databases can’t handle peak logistics concurrency, resulting in lock contention, timeouts, and unpredictable performance at scale.

props.title: TiDB: Unified Platform for Supply Chain Visibility
props.subtitle: TiDB replaces fragmented logistics data stacks with a single, distributed SQL platform that supports both high-volume transactions and real-time analytics. By unifying operational and analytical workloads in one system, TiDB enables global supply chain visibility without batch ETL, manual sharding, or point solutions.

tabs.label: HTAP Engine for Real-Time Visibility
bullets: Single distributed SQL cluster for OLTP + analytics
Region-aware deployment for cross-border logistics networks

tabs.label: Real-Time Inventory Management and Order Tracking
bullets: Consolidate WMS, OMS, and TMS events into one real-time store
Query stock, orders, and carrier events in a single SQL query

tabs.label: Always-On Architecture for Logistics Operations
bullets: Transparent failover with no downtime for live shipments

props.title: From Inventory Management to Last-Mile Visibility
props.subtitle: TiDB supports a range of real-time logistics and supply chain use cases.

items.title: Use Case 1: Real-Time Inventory Across Warehouses & Stores
items.description:
TiDB unifies inventory data across warehouses, stores, and fulfillment centers in real time.
- Combine stock levels, inbound and outbound shipments, and reservations in one system
- Power accurate available-to-promise decisions in seconds, not hours

items.title: Use Case 2: Multi-Leg Shipment Tracking
items.description:
TiDB enables real-time last-mile visibility by ingesting high-velocity delivery data.
  - Stream telematics, driver app events, and delivery scans into a single store
  - Feed route optimization and ETA prediction engines with fresh, consistent data

props.title: Supply Chain Analytics in One HTAP Engine
props.subtitle: TiDB provides a unified architecture for ingesting, storing, and analyzing logistics data in real time. This architecture enables real-time supply chain monitoring and analytics, helping teams enable operational intelligence across logistics, fulfillment, and delivery operations.

items.title: Ingest Once: Streaming & Batch Pipelines
items.description: Connect TMS/WMS/OMS systems, IoT gateways, and Kafka streams. TiDB handles real-time large-scale data ingestion without intermediate ETL layers.

items.title: Unified Store for Supply Chain Analytics
items.description: Consolidate operational tables, event streams, and aggregates in one schema. Run logistics analytics queries without copying data to separate warehouses.

items.title: Built-In Monitoring & Alerting
items.description: Use standard SQL to detect anomalies directly on live data. Power real-time dashboards with Prometheus and Grafana integration. Enable advanced analytics without exporting data.

props.title: Trusted by Logistics and Supply Chain Companies

items.quote: TiDB powers real-time shipment visibility across millions of daily events. We eliminated batch delays and downtime during peak delivery windows.
items.author: Logistics Platform Leader

items.quote: With TiDB, we consolidated fragmented data from WMS, OMS, and TMS into a single platform. Real-time queries replaced delayed reporting pipelines.
items.author: Supply Chain Technology Director

items.quote: Multi-region deployment with transparent failover ensures our logistics operations never stop. We deliver consistent visibility 24/7 across borders.
items.author: Global Courier Operations Manager

props.title: Enable Real-Time Supply Chain Visibility Today
props.subtitle: Join logistics and supply chain leaders delivering real-time visibility without ETL delays, sharding complexity, or downtime.
